reviews.review_description: finally a new game, that fills that need of "oh yea, that's what I thought my Oculus Go for", have only played a short while but, very cool. Other than RUSH, this is the 1st GO title, that really gives a feeling of real flight. The tutorial is pretty hard at first, and you must get thru it, to move on. But when you do, game looks great , digging it so far. Worth checking out, a steal for 2.99, could easily be a top priced title, it would still be worth it, in my opinion, curious what others will say.
Installed but unable to open.  Informed that Oculus software to be update.  Please assist me to solve the problem

The last target in the tutorial disappears just as I reach it,  and then it forces you to do the tutorial again, 6 times now. Very frustrated,  developer, please help!
Update: thanks for responding, out of tutorial now. Feels good to be flying through the city. I wish that there was an option to turn off music and velocity/altitude display, but otherwise a nice experience.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
thank you for playing our games! 
Please make sure to enter all of the circles in the tutorial speed tunnel in order to gain the necessary velocity to reach the red item before it disappears.
KR Games team

reviews.review_description: can't pass the tutorial! The last item always disappeares and there is no way to skip the tutorial... it is also very annoying that you can't skip the very long and slow explanations in the tutorial. If this was fixed it could be 4 or 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
thank you for playing our games! 
Please make sure to enter all of the circles in the tutorial speed tunnel in order to gain the necessary velocity to reach the red item before it disappears.

reviews.review_description: But if you are sensitive to motion sickness, the controls may not suite you. Mooves should be control by the head, not the oculus controler.

Nice! it reminds me of Rush which is another great title for the gear vr and go. a little more graphics polishing etc least in my opinion although the graphics are still pretty good and add more cities if possible. wow KR rocks!

On my Oculus Go I can't proceed past the Tutorial. After getting the red target the game freezes for a second then goes back to the title screen where the only option is to take the tutorial again.

I've tried reinstalling the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
thank you for playing our games! 
Please make sure to enter all of the circles in the tutorial speed tunnel in order to gain the necessary velocity to reach the red item before it disappears.
KR Games team

reviews.review_description:
I love this app, truly what VR is all about. An excellent and immersive experience.
My only problem is the music, I wish I could turn it off ?
But that doesn't spoil the amazing view and feeling of being up there.
Thank you for such a wonderful experience.

Very realistic the feeling is pretty awesome the game itself visually is perfect however it’s too short you cannot glide out to the edge and most of the coast line is only for visuals you can’t even land that is frustrating and should be fixed in some type of update.￼

Jumping off a roof top certainly gives to a weird feeling. It's a good game, though could use more content. Definitely worth playing. It got a couple bad ratings mostly because people didn't understand how to play it. One improvement though would be to utilize more of the city.
The game is fun, for a while. Then it starts to get a bit boring. There is only so much one can do. Is there a way to end a flight without crashing? Could you land anywhere?

Not a bad game although it is very basic. Fly as long as possible without hitting anything or the ground is what its all about. The wind sometimes takes away the immersion with very unrealistic hanglider movements but nothing major it could just use a bit of a brush up really in that area. The City looks great. All in all a good bit of fun but dont be expecting a fully blown flight sim its just not that.
